description: Configuration file for validate-pre-merge.ps1 - Command-line parameters override these defaults

_comments.TargetPath: Path to solution or directory. Default: current directory
_comments.SkipAutoFix: Skip dotnet format auto-fixes. Use for dry-run inspection.
_comments.SkipTests: Skip running tests (NOT RECOMMENDED - tests ensure fixes work)
_comments.DiagnosticFilter: Filter build output by diagnostic codes: 'CS1591,IDE1006'
_comments.MaxOutputLines: Truncate output for AI context limits (50-200 recommended)
_comments.MaxFiles: Batch processing: show issues in first N files (10-50 recommended)
_comments.DryRun: Show what would be done without executing (validation preview)
_comments.JsonOutput: Output in JSON format for AI/automation consumption

Quick validation.Comment: Fast check: build + tests only (no auto-fix)

Documentation focus.Comment: Fix and validate XML documentation only

Batch fixing.Comment: Fix 10 files at a time for large codebases

CI/CD pipeline.Comment: Validation only, structured output for pipeline
